creator: rob.roland@outlook.com
text:
gnome-photos crashes at startup:

(org.gnome.Photos:12679): gnome-photos-WARNING **: 12:55:53.231: Unable to create connection for session-wide Tracker indexer at org.freedesktop.Tracker3.Miner.Files: GDBus.Error:org.freedesktop.DBus.Error.ServiceUnknown: The name org.freedesktop.Tracker3.Miner.Files was not provided by any .service files

(org.gnome.Photos:12679): GLib-GIO-ERROR **: 12:55:53.396: Settings schema 'org.freedesktop.Tracker3.Miner.Files' is not installed
[1]    12679 trace trap (core dumped)  gnome-photos

$ lldb -c gnome-photos.core -- $(which gnome-photos)
